## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between getden.io and growthx.ai, discussing their respective AI-powered tools and business strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [getden.io offers a natural language N8N-like tool for non-technical users, focusing on PLG efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [growthx.ai operates as an AI-powered agency, specializing in content creation with $11M revenue](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Both companies face challenges in balancing ease-of-use with delivering deep, reliable value](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Potential for future collaboration or joining forces was subtly suggested](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)

## Topics

### getden.io's Product Overview

  - [Natural language version of N8N for non-technical users](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Previously included chat, docs, and agents (now streamlined)](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [80+ tool integrations through MCP](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [200,000+ agents built on the platform](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Raised $5.5M seed from General Catalyst post-YC](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)

### growthx.ai's Business Model

  - [AI-powered agency with both internal tools and openness to external solutions](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [$11M in revenue, raising Series B](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Average deal size: $200,000](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Specializes in content creation with expert interventions](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Exploring more self-serve options](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)

### Market Challenges and Strategies

  - [Time-to-value vs. depth of utility trade-off](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Horizontal vs. vertical focus debate](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [Need for specificity: "Harvey AI for something"](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [Labs (e.g., OpenAI) eating into horizontal plays](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Importance of having "10x better" value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)

### Use Cases and Customer Adoption

  - [getden.io: 50% personal use (calendar, emails), 50% business (mainly PLG efficiency)](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [growthx.ai: Deep research, content generation, customer-specific projects](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Challenge: Making agents truly useful and reliable for non-technical team members](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)

### Technical Insights

  - [Importance of company context for effective agent performance](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Integration of various data sources (transcripts, metrics, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Use of cloud projects and prompts for workflow management](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Stay in touch for potential future collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [getden.io to consider deeper focus on specific verticals or use cases](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [growthx.ai to explore more self-serve options and internal workflow optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/HxsHzeg4F_QyjSisX9B3bJVvj6waqBy8?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
